title: Kellochloa verrucosa

Kellochloa verrucosa is further classified as belonging to the order Poales. The classification of Kellochloa verrucosa is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Liliopsida, and Order: Poales.
